morning.t: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
Do something today that your future self will thank you for.
It always seems impossible until it's done.
Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
Motivation gets you going. Discipline keeps you growing.
Small daily improvements over time lead to stunning results.
A year from now you will wish you had started today.
Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
Don't count the days, make the days count.
The pain of discipline is far less than the pain of regret.
We become what we repeatedly do.
Consistency is what transforms average into excellence.
Either you run the day, or the day runs you.
Focus on being productive instead of busy.
Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
Work hard in silence. Let success make the noise.
Do the hard jobs first. The easy jobs will take care of themselves.
The successful warrior is the average person with laser-like focus.
You will never always be motivated. You have to learn to be disciplined.
Earn it. Every. Single. Day.
Show up when it's hard. Especially when it's hard.
One day or day one. You decide.
Push yourself because no one else is going to do it for you.
Dream big. Start small. Act now.
Today's preparation determines tomorrow's achievement.
The goal is not to be perfect. The goal is to be better today.
Energy and persistence conquer all things.
Action is the foundational key to all success.
Great things never came from comfort zones.
The morning is the rudder of the day.
Excellence is not a destination, it's a continuous journey.
You are not your excuses.
The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
What you do today can improve all your tomorrows.
Your future is created by what you do today, not tomorrow.
The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
Champions aren't made in gyms. Champions are made from something deep inside them.
Some people want it to happen, some wish it would happen, others make it happen.

evening.t: Well done is better than well said.
Rest when you're weary. Refresh and renew yourself.
Be proud of how hard you're trying.
You did the work. Now let the work do its work.
Tonight, be grateful for what you did. Tomorrow, decide what you'll improve.
Sleep is the best meditation.
Every accomplishment starts with the decision to try.
Don't judge each day by the harvest you reap but by the seeds that you plant.
Tomorrow is always fresh with no mistakes in it.
Be easy on yourself. You're doing better than you think.
Finish each day and be done with it.
Even if today was hard, you showed up. That matters.
What you do today creates every tomorrow.
The strongest people win battles we know nothing about.
In the end, it's not the years in your life that count. It's the life in your years.
Reflect on your blessings. Every man has many.
Grateful for the effort. Ready for tomorrow.
The day is always his who works in it with serenity and great aims.
Take rest; a field that has rested gives a bountiful crop.
The sun gathers strength and courage as the day gets on.

comeback.t: Every master was once a disaster.
You didn't lose the streak. You lost one day. Come back tomorrow.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
A setback is a setup for a comeback.
It's not how many times you fall. It's how many times you get back up.
The comeback is always stronger than the setback.
Every day is a new beginning. Take a deep breath and start again.
Failure is not the opposite of success. It's part of the journey.
Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
Forget past mistakes. Forget failures. Forget everything except what you're going to do now.
Reset. Refocus. Restart. As many times as you need to.
Your only competition is who you were yesterday.
You are allowed to be both a masterpiece and a work in progress.
The secret of change is to focus all energy not on fighting the old but on building the new.
